meat.translate: мясо, пища, мякоть, еда, суть, содержание, ядро, пища для размышления
mnemonic: meat [ми:т] мясо - На (мит-инге) мясо обещали коммунисты.

examples.eng: The meat cuts easily.
The meat is a bit off.
Cut the fat off the meat.
The meat swims in gravy.
The meat is tender and juicy.
The restaurant serves a variety of meats.
examples.ru: В ресторане подают разнообразные мясные блюда.

examples.eng: Meat shrinks as it cooks.
examples.ru: Мясо уменьшается (в объеме) во время готовки.

examples.eng: Cut the meat into small cubes.
Red meat is a rich source of iron.
examples.ru: Красное мясо является богатым источником железа.

examples.eng: Brown the meat in the pan.
He allowed himself no meat.
Check to see if the meat is done.
milk, meat, and other animal products
examples.ru: молоко, мясо и другие продукты животного происхождения

examples.eng: The meat goes bad / spoils.
Carve the meat into slices.
I like my meat very well done.
examples.ru: Я люблю, чтобы мясо было хорошо прожарено.

examples.eng: Meat will keep in the cellar.
First brown the meat in a pan.
The cost of meat finally fell.
The meat was burned to a crisp.
Chop the meat into small cubes.
The meat of the sheep is mutton.
Do you think the meat's gone off?
Transfer the meat to warm plates.
Skewer the meat for the BBQ.
examples.ru: Насадите /нанижите/ на шампур /вертел/ мясо для барбекю.

examples.eng: The meat still needs to stew.
a tough, stringy piece of meat
The meat of a deer is venison.
All meat is sold less the bone.
Cut any excess fat from the meat.
examples.ru: Срежьте с мяса весь лишний жир.
